summary.finance: Amazon's AI investment and Intel's manufacturing recovery lead market sentiment; focus on tech infrastructure.
summary.art: BAMA 2026 continues at BEXCO; ongoing exhibitions at SeMA.

market_highlights: Amazon (AMZN) investing $50B in OpenAI, expanding AWS ecosystem and Trainium chips.
Intel (INTC) surges 8-9% after Fab 34 stake reacquisition and positive outlook on Core Ultra Series 3.
Market sentiment turning positive on fundamental shifts in tech manufacturing and AI infrastructure.
art_highlights: BAMA 2026 continues through April 5 at BEXCO.
Seo-Seoul Museum of Art 'SeMA Performance' remains open to public.
